channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Frustrated Microsoft Researcher Uses Goats in 'Age of Empires II' to Demo the Absurdity of LLMs - Gizmodo
item.description:
1. Frustrated Microsoft Researcher Uses Goats in 'Age of Empires II' to Demo the Absurdity of LLMs  Gizmodo
  2. If AI Is Sentient Then So Is ‘Age of Empires II’  404 Media
  3. Microsoft researcher builds a working neural network out of goats in Age of Empires II to critique AI science  the-decoder.com
  4. Microsoft researcher builds goat-powered neural network in Age of Empires 2 to show why we should 'stop assuming that LLMs behave like humans just because they were trained with natural language'  PC Gamer
  5. Microsoft and York University Paper Challenges How We Attribute "Humanity" to LLMs  quasa.io
